description: context COPY parents reconstructs ordered file directory and glob paths under WORKDIR

writes.Dockerfile:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1.20
FROM base
WORKDIR /work
COPY --parents lib/x.rb app/helpers/ public/*.html ./
COPY --parents lib/x.rb public/*.html /no-slash
RUN test "$(cat lib/x.rb)" = ruby-changed && test "$(cat app/helpers/value.rb)" = helper && test "$(cat public/a.html)" = a && test "$(cat public/z.html)" = z && test "$(cat /no-slash/lib/x.rb)" = ruby-changed && test "$(cat /no-slash/public/a.html)" = a && test "$(cat /no-slash/public/z.html)" = z && mkdir -p /oracle && printf changed >/oracle/result
